topic: My grocery receipt listed items I never bought at prices from twenty years ago
title: My Grocery Receipt Listed Items I Never Bought at Prices from Twenty Years Ago | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My grocery receipt listed six items I never put in my cart. The prices were not from this decade.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a long thermal printed grocery receipt held in a hand against a self checkout terminal background, supermarket overhead light, blurred store aisles visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Kroger on Maple Avenue. Tuesday night. Self checkout. Nobody else in the store.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a Kroger supermarket at night, fluorescent ceiling lights, empty long aisles, a row of self checkout terminals at the front, no people visible, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a paper grocery bag opened on a self checkout counter, a loaf of bread, a gallon of milk and a carton of eggs visible inside, fluorescent overhead, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Receipt had Beechnut gum. Tab Cola. Items off shelves twenty years.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail shot of a thermal printed receipt unrolled showing faded line items in old fashioned typeface, low contrast printer output, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Checked my bag. Just the three.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a paper grocery bag opened on a kitchen counter at home, three items visible inside, dim late night kitchen lighting, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But the receipt showed sixty four dollars charged. I had paid for twelve.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail shot of the bottom of a thermal receipt showing a printed total of sixty four dollars, partially curled, fluorescent overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Drove back to the store. Showed it.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a Kroger customer service counter at night, an arm extending a receipt across the counter, no faces shown, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Manager said those prices have not been valid since nineteen ninety four.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a printed price chart from the nineteen nineties pinned to a corkboard, the receipt held next to it for comparison, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He pulled camera footage. The checkout was empty the entire hour I was there.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a black and white security monitor showing an empty self checkout aisle from above, timestamp overlay visible, no figures, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: On the receipt at the bottom. Cashier ID. The name was mine.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail shot of the bottom of a thermal receipt showing a cashier ID line with a name printed clearly, blurred receipt edges, dim ambient, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have not gone back to that Kroger.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a Kroger supermarket parking lot at night, the red K logo glowing on the storefront, no cars near the entrance, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Receipts keep appearing in my mailbox. Same items. Same prices. Different dates.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a metal residential mailbox on a porch with a thermal receipt protruding from the slot, dim porch light, vertical 9:16 framing
